title: Robot Future
summary: Phil's public home for AI writing, tech projects, future-of-technology essays, and the systems behind that work.
description: Robot Future is the flagship capital of the portfolio. It combines public writing, technical experiments, and a full-stack publishing platform around AI, Unreal Engine development, and future tech.
The site also acts as Phil's public brand. It connects his game work, AI experiments, and philosophy about using advanced tools to free people for bigger questions.

media.caption: The live public home tying together writing, projects, and future-tech worldbuilding.

media.caption: A public-facing capital tying writing, experiments, and future-tech worldbuilding together.

greatWorks.title: Future-Tech Beacon
greatWorks.summary: A public technical brand that makes Phil's work legible and memorable to strangers.

highlights: Built a public technical brand around AI, game development, and future tech.
Runs as a full-stack React, TypeScript, and Express platform with cloud services.
Combines public writing, project showcase, and ongoing experimentation in one hub.
